input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed javac failure is caused by an existing test importing org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.Iterables, which is no longer present in the janino artifact in 3.1.0; the equivalent utility package is in commons-compiler under org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator, but this is a test/API adjustment rather than extra setup.
Avoid relying on optional Ant integration unless the test explicitly adds Ant support; meaningful Janino coverage can be reached without testing AntCompilerAdapter.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Janino 3.1.0 is usable through its normal public compiler/evaluator APIs with the standard test dependency on org.codehaus.janino:janino; its required commons-compiler dependency is transitive, and no Docker service, extra Maven dependency, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful coverage.
